caption: A video features a split-screen layout showcasing two people in separate indoor settings. On the left is a woman with red hair wearing a blue patterned shirt and red earrings, speaking to the camera. On the right is a man with glasses and a goatee wearing a purple button-down shirt; he is seen adjusting his hair and speaking. In his background, a framed picture hangs on a blue wall next to a sign that partially reads "PEN." A blue banner at the bottom of the screen contains white text. The left side of the banner reads "FOCUS with Margaret Harrington," while the right side reads "No More Time Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty," accompanied by a "TOWN MEETING TV" logo. Across the sequence, the woman remains in a similar pose while speaking, and the man moves his hand from his head to his side as he continues to talk.
